themes.headline: AUM crossed ₹7.5T; market share 11.5% (12.7% ex-ETF on QAAUM)
themes.detail: Equity-oriented assets at ₹5T = 64% of QAAUM (vs industry 56%).

themes.headline: FY25 = 13th consecutive year of positive industry net flows
themes.detail: Industry AUM ₹65.7T (+23% YoY); ₹12.3T increase, of which ₹8.2T was net new flows.

themes.headline: Industry SIP touched record ₹265 bn monthly in Dec '24; ₹259 bn in Mar '25
themes.detail: FY25 added only ₹67 bn to monthly SIP flows over FY24 — pace flattening at high levels.

themes.headline: Equity-oriented NFOs: ₹900 bn (18% of net active equity flows) in FY25
themes.detail: Prior year ₹546 bn (23% of flows). NFO drag remains a structural feature.
